update.clogs:
Base Version: 422.0.0.44.64
Base Updated

Added: Creative Fonts for DMs — You can send stylish text using cool fonts in your DMs, It makes your messages look unique and stand out from others. (Premium)

Added: App Startup Tab — Choose which tab should open automatically when you start the app.

Added: Reorder Navigation Tabs — Long Press and Drag to reorder navigation tabs. Toggle to show/hide tabs.

Added: Choose WhatsApp Type — You can choose WhatsApp or WhatsApp Business based on what you need. Note: This option is only for reposting to your WhatsApp Story.

Added: New iOS 26.4 Emoji.

Fixed: Fonts and Emojis — Now you'll able to load .ttf file from Local Storage.

Fixed: Random Crashes.

Fixed: Story Crashes.

Fixed: Hidden Mentions.

Fixed: Hide Chats.

Fixed: Copy Comments issues.

Fixed: Download issues.

Fixed: UI/UX.

Improved: Ghost Mode.

Improved: Performance.
